introSection: Super 8 is a steel roller coaster located at Argenpark in Luján, Buenos Aires, Argentina.

sections.title: History
sections.content:
This roller coaster began operation in the early 1960s at Ital Park in Buenos Aires, Argentina and was called Super 8 Volante. The cars were later replaced with a newer type of Pinfari cars. It closed with the park on 11 November 1990.

It reopened at Argenpark around 1993.

sections.title: Design
sections.content: This is thought to be a Pinfari Zyklon however the layout does not match any other Zyklon roller coaster. The cars appear to be identical to those used on Zyklon coasters.

fullText:
Super 8 is a steel roller coaster located at Argenpark in Luján, Buenos Aires, Argentina.

This roller coaster began operation in the early 1960s at Ital Park in Buenos Aires, Argentina and was called Super 8 Volante. The cars were later replaced with a newer type of Pinfari cars. It closed with the park on 11 November 1990.

It reopened at Argenpark around 1993.

This is thought to be a Pinfari Zyklon however the layout does not match any other Zyklon roller coaster. The cars appear to be identical to those used on Zyklon coasters.
